languages.text: {n}Себериан грустно усмехается — звук похож на лязг сломанного механизма.{/n} "Воистину. Мое время миновало безвозвратно".
{n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан грустно усмехается — звук похож на лязг сломанного механизма.{/n} "Воистину. Мое время миновало безвозвратно".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

{n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安发出一声苦涩的轻笑，听来像坏掉的机械在嘎吱作响。{/n}“没错。我的时代已经过去了，永不复还。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安发出一声苦涩的轻笑，听来像坏掉的机械在嘎吱作响。{/n}“没错。我的时代已经过去了，永不复还。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian suelta una risa amarga que te recuerda al clamor de un mecanismo roto.{/n} «Así es. Mi época ha pasado y no volverá jamás».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian suelta una risa amarga que te recuerda al clamor de un mecanismo roto.{/n} «Así es. Mi época ha pasado y no volverá jamás».

languages.text: {n}Seberian laisse échapper un petit rire amer semblable au raclement d'un mécanisme brisé.{/n} « En effet. Mon temps est révolu. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian laisse échapper un petit rire amer semblable au raclement d'un mécanisme brisé.{/n} « En effet. Mon temps est révolu. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, kırık bir mekanizmanın şıngırtısına benzeyen acı bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Öyle. Benim zamanım geçti, bir daha dönmemek üzere."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, kırık bir mekanizmanın şıngırtısına benzeyen acı bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Öyle. Benim zamanım geçti, bir daha dönmemek üzere."

languages.text: {n}Seberian stößt ein verbittertes Lachen aus, das wie das Klappern eines defekten Mechanismus klingt.{/n} "In der Tat. Meine Zeit ist vorbei und kommt nie zurück."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian stößt ein verbittertes Lachen aus, das wie das Klappern eines defekten Mechanismus klingt.{/n} "In der Tat. Meine Zeit ist vorbei und kommt nie zurück."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは苦い笑みを浮かべ、壊れた機械の音がするような声で言った。{/n}「確かに。私の時間は過ぎ去り、二度と戻ってこない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a bitter chuckle, the sound like the clanking of a broken mechanism.{/n} "Indeed. My time has passed, never to return."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは苦い笑みを浮かべ、壊れた機械の音がするような声で言った。{/n}「確かに。私の時間は過ぎ去り、二度と戻ってこない。」
